reviews.review_msg: A great professor, really ignited a passion for bioinformatics and provides many real-world examples through discussion questions. Great guest lectures, I would definitely take a class with him in the future!

Lectures are extremely dry, does not put any effort into making the material interesting at all and basically killed any interest I had in bioinformatics. Talks in one tone for the entire two hours of lecture. Labs are easy but do not enforce lecture material very well.

Nice guy. Doesn't put an effort into making the material more meaningful, he used someone elses slides. Labs were ok, got to leave early once you finished, labs didn't reinforce all the material. Fell asleep every class. You'll need lots of coffee! LOL cuz shiz hellz boring! The class would be better if there were two midterms instead of a final.

Lectures are two hours two times a week, and he asks questions in class for participation marks.  The material is detailed but interesting.  Midterms are not easy but no curve-balls and they're non-cumulative. There is a wide range of material covered, so it samples a bit of everything. Great guy, cares about students, tries to make it interesting
